summary: Comprehensive testing of JT-Zero robotics dashboard completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend 95% functional with minor chart rendering issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Chart width/height error: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'
ui_bugs.impact: Console warnings, charts may not render optimally but functionality not broken

passed_tests: All REST API endpoints (health, state, events, telemetry, threads, engines)
Command functionality (ARM, DISARM, TAKEOFF, LAND, HOLD, RTL, EMERGENCY)
Flight mode state changes with commands
Dashboard panel loading (Header, Sidebar, DronePanel, SensorPanels, EventLog, CommandPanel)
Sensor health indicators (IMU, Barometer, GPS, Rangefinder, Optical Flow)
System statistics display (CPU, RAM, temperature, threads, engines)
Command button functionality with visual feedback
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issue in TelemetryCharts component - ensure chart containers have proper dimensions before rendering

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All endpoints and functionality working perfectly
success_percentage.frontend: 95% - Minor chart rendering issue, otherwise fully functional
success_percentage.integration: 100% - Commands, WebSocket, real-time updates all working
